narrative: Trump signals negotiated Iran deal and Strait of Hormuz reopening, triggering a 5% WTI collapse and cooling geopolitical risk premiums. USD/JPY holds at 158.85 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the primary anchor despite the de-escalation; gold steady +0.00%; equities +0.37%; DXY -0.21%; VIX 16.7. EUR/USD firms to 1.1641 after Lagarde flags inflation forecast revisions, though the 175bp Fed-ECB carry spread caps upside. Watch the RBNZ rate decision May 27 at 02:00 UTC.
